name: grok-web
description: Web UI for the grok CLI — speaks ACP over its agent stdio.

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.format: biome format --write biome.json package.json public/js/ui public/js/modelpicker.js public/js/topbar.js public/js/routines.js public/js/sidebar.js public/js/settings.js public/js/state.js public/js/dispatch.js test/helpers.mjs test/ui-security.test.mjs test/visual-smoke.mjs
scripts.format:check: biome format biome.json package.json public/js/ui public/js/modelpicker.js public/js/topbar.js public/js/routines.js public/js/sidebar.js public/js/settings.js public/js/state.js public/js/dispatch.js test/helpers.mjs test/ui-security.test.mjs test/visual-smoke.mjs
